steps.title: Identify the concrete film example
steps.content: The notes establish that Prieto was the cinematographer for Frida (2002). The question asks which choice best provides an example of a film Prieto worked on, meaning we need the choice that explicitly names this specific film.

steps.title: Verify the choice names the film
steps.content:
Choice B — The 2002 film Frida is one example of Rodrigo Prieto's work as a cinematographer. identifies Frida (2002) as an example of Prieto's cinematography work, using the concrete film from the notes that the question asks us to provide.

The others skip the specific film name, omit Prieto, or describe the profession generally rather than exemplifying his work.

That matches Choice B — The 2002 film Frida is one example of Rodrigo Prieto's work as a cinematographer..
